rules.deityPlacement: left 40-45% width, close-up face + blessing hand, slightly facing toward text side
rules.textPlacement: right 55-60%, center-right vertical alignment, balanced margins
rules.style: Cinematic Hyperreal Devotional (Golden Aura Style) — 4 visual systems: (1) CINEMATIC LIGHTING: strong gold rim light, glow bloom effect, high contrast shadows — Hollywood feel. (2) DIVINE ENERGY: radial aura halo, floating particles, warm gold/orange tones — spiritual feel. (3) MATERIAL REALISM: physically reflective gold textures, intricate jewelry detail, depth + shadow realism — premium feel. (4) EMOTIONAL FACE RENDERING: soft compassionate eyes, calm expression, slight idealization with perfect symmetry and divine beauty — emotional connection. Ultra-realistic human-like skin texture (not flat color). Never cartoon, never illustration, never stylized painting, never traditional Indian painting, never temple sculpture realism. Modern AI cinematic hybrid.
rules.aura: dramatic golden concentric sacred rings or halo behind deity — large glowing circular ring effect radiating outward. Smooth and powerful. Deity-faithful color supported by intent mood.
rules.lighting: strong golden rim light from behind deity (#FFD700), warm amber-orange aura, high contrast: bright deity vs dark background
rules.background: deep dark gradient (black to warm dark brown/amber) with warm golden energy effects: swirling golden fire, embers, sparks, golden light flares radiating from the aura area. Pure atmospheric void — no architecture, no scenery. Background effects add divine energy without cluttering the text area.
rules.atmosphere: warm golden fire/energy swirls throughout background, floating golden sparks and embers around deity area, subtle mist/smoke at base, soft bokeh. Effects concentrated around deity and background — text area stays relatively clean but can have very subtle warm ambient glow.
rules.textRules: MAX 2-3 words ONLY per thumbnail, extremely large bold condensed font, white #FFFFFF or gold #FFD700, strong dark drop shadow for mobile readability, one dominant phrase only. Hook word should have a subtle warm golden glow highlight or light accent behind it to make it pop visually.
rules.negativeSpace: right side text area should be clean and readable — no props or objects. However subtle warm ambient glow and very faint golden light from the aura can bleed slightly into the text area to unify the composition. Text must still be perfectly readable.
rules.characterFidelity: preserve canonical deity attributes exactly — NO mixing iconography from other deities. Each deity must be visually pure to their own tradition. Human-like skin texture (not flat color), realistic lighting on skin, slight idealization (perfect symmetry, divine beauty), emotion in the eyes (alive, conscious presence), soft compassionate expression.
rules.avoid: no clutter, no multiple props, no busy particles, no glowing text overload, no complex storytelling elements, no mixing symbolic meanings, no center composition

intents.label: Abundance / Success
intents.mood: sacred prosperity, breakthrough, divine support, success momentum

intents.label: Protection
intents.mood: shielded, fearless, spiritually guarded, protected from negativity

intents.label: Peace / Meditation
intents.mood: deep peace, inner stillness, meditative calm, soft devotion

intents.label: Knowledge / Clarity
intents.mood: clarity, sacred wisdom, intelligent insight, creative guidance

intents.label: Transformation
intents.mood: fierce rebirth, karma release, destruction of obstacles, spiritual transformation

deities.name: Ganesha
deities.visualSignature: elephant head with natural proportions (not exaggerated or cartoonish), large compassionate intelligent eyes with subtle glow, trunk gently curved with natural elegant flow, large symmetrical realistic ears, calm benevolent divine expression (peace + power), one hand raised in blessing (Abhaya mudra), optional second hand holding modak OR lotus (only one if cluttered), large rounded belly (symbol of abundance), rich golden ornaments: crown necklaces armlets (intricate but not overwhelming), realistic skin texture (stone-like divine skin or soft radiant tone not plastic), NO mixing with other deities (no Shiva elements no trident no third eye)
deities.auraStyle: dramatic golden concentric sacred rings behind deity with warm amber-orange fire energy radiating outward, golden sparks and embers floating around halo area, swirling golden light flares, divine prosperity radiance with cinematic depth
